hotel_name: La Quinta Resort & Club, Curio Collection by Hilton

reviews.title: Horrible Experience
reviews.text: They were way overbooked and no staff or facilities to handle the amount of people.
reviews.room_type: Resort Casita 1 King Bed - Mountain View

reviews.title: Dissapointed
reviews.negatives: First room AC not working at all with 115 temp outside took 3 phone calls and 2 conversations with management to get another room. The second room had bad sewer smell to shower are woke up at 5:40 am to Find big long magets in the bathroom nasty 🤮 hotel not up to par got the price. Restaurant Adobe worst service husband got meal he didn’t order but after an hour and a half he just took it, Morgan’s overpriced for the very small portions don’t go hungry to that restaurant, the market has infestation of little bus by the beef jerky area. Don’t recommend this hotel, disappointing

reviews.title: La Quinta by Hilton
reviews.text:
Very unique setting, great layout with lots of space and character. For sure recommended by us.
Mark

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Room was old. U

reviews.title: Amazing Resort!!!!
reviews.text:
Each time I find myself traveling down towards the Palm Spring area, my first choice of hotel. accommodations is always LaQuinta Resort & Club. From the minute you turn off of Eisenhower Drive and onto the property, your senses taken it all in .From the manicured lawns and red tiled roofs to the Hacienda architecture, nothing is out of place. 
As you check-in, the staff is extremely welcoming and accommodating to any queries you might have.  Upon entering your Casita you are thrilled with all the details that have been given.  The bathrooms are equipped with plush towels & robes and the beds are like puffy clouds!   Quality that all Hilton properties provide.  The restaurant serves delis fare and everything you experience guarantees a restful, pleasant and satisfying stay.  Whether you sty a day or a week, you will definitely not be disappointed.
My family and I love LaQuinta and highly recommend the resort!!!
Thank you LaQuinta and we will see. you next year!
reviews.room_type: RESORT CASITA - 2 QUEEN BEDS - MOUNTAIN VIEW

reviews.title: Terrible due to poor customer service and no sleep.
reviews.positives: It was a beautiful location and resort.
reviews.negatives: The staff was terrible. We were not able to sleep the second night at all. The people next to us partied until 4:00 am. We reported them multiple times starting at midnight until 4:00 am. It was a terrible experience. We paid too much to be miserable all night! The staff did nothing to resolve the situation. It doesn’t matter how beautiful something is when you are exhausted and no one will help you. The staff here is not capable of handling difficult situations.

reviews.title: Concert getaway
reviews.text: We absolutely loved our stay at La Quinta. We intend to return for sure. 💕
reviews.room_type: RESORT CASITA KG MOB/HEARING ACC W/ R-IN SHWR

reviews.title: Won’t be going back.
reviews.negatives: Room wasn’t thoroughly clean.   Side table was dirty.   Carpet felt grungy.  Worms in room.   Food in bar/lounge was awful.  Ordered a French Dip sandwich (recommended by bartender).   Came out cold, stale bread and cold au jus.   Sent back and came out worse.   Asked manager to take it off our bill, she wasn’t happy about it.

reviews.title: La Quinta Resort 5 Star Stay
reviews.text: Excellent room, staff, pools, amenities, and  restaurants!
reviews.room_type: RESORT CASITA - 2 QUEEN BEDS - MOUNTAIN VIEW

reviews.title: Pretty property but room was less than desirable
reviews.positives: The food and service at the restaurant was great.
reviews.negatives: Our room was run down. Our toilet did not flush properly and they said they fixed it twice. Our fireplace did not work and then was fixed. Our shower head did not fully come on without the water still coming out of the tub spout. The property is pretty but our room was less than desirable for the money. I asked them to comp one room night and they comped us two service fees.

reviews.title: Wonderful!!
reviews.text:
This resort is in beautiful spanish form.
Even the roomservice brunch was so delicious.
Most of all, the best part was
The swimming pool is arranged in each building.
reviews.room_type: RESORT CASITA 2 QN MOB/HEAR ACC W/ R-IN SHWR

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The rooms are too old, the whole place needs an uplift

reviews.title: Classic Hospitality
reviews.text: Everyone at this location treats you the same: sincere hospitality & care!  They are friendly, courteous, genuine & funny!   From the moment we arrived at the entry door, bellmen greet you like you been gone for a long time, and this was our first time!   You never have to leave the property cause everything is there!  The room was fantastic, spacious, clean and comfortable!  And, we were even upgraded!  This mini-city has "Great food, great shopping, great swimming and great golf"!  Thanks again for a wonderful time!
reviews.room_type: RESORT CASITA - 2 QUEEN BEDS - MOUNTAIN VIEW

reviews.title: No value for money
reviews.negatives: The most unfriendly and unprofessional check in staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Love this hotel and look forward to coming back!

reviews.title: Likely Not Going To Happen
reviews.positives: I’ve visited this property many many times and stayed here many many times , lately the only thing I like is the lobby , since it smells nice and it’s clean and the landscaping.
reviews.negatives: The rooms are poorly maintained and deteriorating ….The pools were cloudy which means not enough chlorine was  in them and they are all in desperate need of re-plastering . The jacuzzi has black algae it was disgusting! The room smelled like dirt when the air conditioner was turned on and the bathroom doors were sticky ! When this was bought up to the front desk , it was just brushed off and to top it off we were fed back with “we hope you stay with us again .” Yeah , likely not going to happen ! For a high standard costly hotel we expected a lot more.

reviews.title: 이국적인 최적의 리조트
reviews.text: 돌산으로 둘로싸인 가운데 하늘로 뻗어있는 야자나무가 사막 한가운데 오아시스에서 머무는 듯한 느낌을 줍니다. 또한 특색없는 단조로운 건물들이 아니라 이국적인 낮은 리조트 건물들도 매력적입니다. 하루만 머물기에는 너무 아쉬워서 늦은 체크아웃이 가능한지 물었고 11시가 아닌 12시반까지 시간을 늘려줬습니다. 우리 가족은 찌는 듯한 더위 속에서 아주 만족스러운 휴가를 보내고 왔습니다.
reviews.room_type: RESORT CASITA - 2 QUEEN BEDS - MOUNTAIN VIEW

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Room was loud, very dated and worn out rooms in serious need of a remodel and face lift.

reviews.title: Golf
reviews.text:
속소 좋고, 골프치기도 좋습니다.
PGA WEST

reviews.title: Charged me way to much money. Insane and won’t stay ever again.
reviews.positives: They charged me way to much money for literally everything. The charges were absolutely unacceptable and they just charged my card. I won’t be staying here again due to this.
reviews.negatives: See above

reviews.title: ok
reviews.positives: picturesque resort, good restaurants, wonderful staff
reviews.negatives: Rooms in my area run down, noisy Air conditioner and refrigerator too noisy unable to sleep good, carpet old worn out, beds old furniture run down..could use updates…

reviews.title: Excellent experience but the hidden costs were disappointing
reviews.negatives: Room's carpet really dirty. Restaurants with somewhat high prices, swimming pool with limited sunshades, no umbrellas to move from locations inside the hotel under 100oF, teenagers riding scooters in the pedestrian walks and pool area, Mexican restaurant below average, over 30 minutes to get some cutlery delivered to the room, unexpected costs such as $40 for resort fee and $25 parking per day i.e. 20% additional cost per day

reviews.title: Everything was great except for how dirty two of the pools were.
reviews.negatives: Two of the pools were filthy. I have never seen as many flies and bugs.  I had the staff call twice to bring me a net (I wanted to clean it myself), and no one came.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Check in at 4 pm is too late and check out at 11 to early. I had to drive outside the premises to my unit. Very confusing and difficult to find.

reviews.title: Expensive and not worth it.
reviews.negatives: Television did not work. Air conditioning was very loud.

reviews.title: The properties incredibly beautiful, the room was not clean or updated.
reviews.positives: Beautiful buildings and structure and flowers and gardens
reviews.negatives: Not kept clean. For a 5 star hotel, my sheets were not changed as I requested, my sink was clogged, the carpets need to be removed and renewed …at least washed and cleaned. Not vacuumed properly. The toilet was not cleaned right, there was the previous persons poop on the toilet area… floors were not clean… hair on floor all over… the water bottles were not renewed… tv is angled upwards towards the ceiling, pillows smelled like BO… sheets were old and flimsy… comforters old and smelly.

reviews.title: All in all very nice. When we checked out, the staff on that day, were very nice.
reviews.positives: Easy to get to. Laid out nicely.
reviews.negatives: Adrian.  Not a people person!  Did not welcome us. Told us to stand back until he was ready.  Did not care what we had to say! It was clear he would rather be somewhere else.  Pepe and everyone else were very nice.  The grounds were beautiful.

reviews.title: It was cool however there was A LOT of construction
reviews.negatives: Lots of construction

reviews.title: Great family location.
reviews.negatives: Pools and jacuzzi became cloudy and green quickly each day. Not many options for room service.

reviews.title: We had a great time
reviews.negatives: The house keeping took forever and also when I booked my reservation with booking.com it said no resort fee and all taxes were included and then come to find out I still was charged. I felt that was not fair

reviews.title: It was a special occasion and we did have a good time.
reviews.negatives: The toilet in our room did not flush properly. The guests next door were extremely loud and we could hear them as if they were talking in our room.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: not enough seating at pools
